flows.name: youtube-latest
flows.description: Fetch the latest 5 video titles from a YouTube channel.

steps.name: Fetch videos
steps.content:
# FETCH YOUTUBE CHANNEL VIDEOS

## PURPOSE

Fetch the latest 5 video titles from a YouTube channel.

## WORKFLOW

1. Use `web_fetch` to load: https://www.youtube.com/@wideoprezentacje/videos

2. From the page content, extract the titles of the 5 most recent videos.

3. Write the result to `{{run.dir}}/_result.md` in this format:

   # Latest Videos — @wideoprezentacje

   1. First video title
   2. Second video title
   3. Third video title
   4. Fourth video title
   5. Fifth video title

## RULES

- Only list the video titles, no descriptions or links needed
- List exactly 5 most recent videos in order
- Do not search for other sources, only use the provided URL
